subcodes.first_line: O Refuge of the World! The degrees of thy yearning, longing, rapture and attraction in the Most Holy Court are proclaimed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای جهان جهان پناه میفرماید مراتب شوق و اشتیاق و وله و انجذابت در ساحت اقدس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
